highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Does Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) has been rated 3.2 on placements.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur)?
faqs.answer: Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) offers Degree and Diploma courses including 6 UG and 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Production Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.question: Which courses does Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) offer to students?
faqs.answer: Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) has courses such as B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Production Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur)?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) is up to 438. Good thing to know is that Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

placements.overview:
Founded in 2008, Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) is a private institute. It is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) provides UG, PG and After 10th courses in Full Time mode. It provides 10 courses across specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology and Mechanical Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM and After 10th Diploma. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) fees ranges between INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800. The student intake for these courses is 438. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) offers all the campus facilities to students.

Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) programmes is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) programmes is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college was good.

review_content.Placements: In this college, the placements are good; in 2023, about 70% of students got placed in computer science engineering. The highest package was offered around INR 9 to 11 LPA and the lowest was around INR 3 to 4 LPA. Companies like HCL, Rigen, Quick Heal, and many more are coming. The internship was available for all the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college was awesome. All the facilities are available here. The classrooms are big and the smart board is available in all the classes. A very huge library was also present in this college. The hostel facility was available, which has good-quality of rooms. Sports and all the games were available in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely satisfied with our college. Facilities, teachers and all things are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average here but not excellent. It is value for money. The top courses offered in our college are CSE, ME, CE, etc. Students who got internships from this college are mostly from CSE, ME, etc. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 6.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is infrastructure for labs, course department and Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also good. The quality of facilities provided in this college and hostel is very good. The food served in the mess is very expensive and tasty. Medical facilities and sports and games are also available on this campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for students' mindset because there are no problems created at this place.

review_content.Placements: Many companies visit our campus for placements, but these companies are very bad because they provide the jobs of helpers. So the selected students do not join these type of companies because there is no satisfaction and it's a waste of time. If you think this college has good placements, then you are wrong.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and sports. There are separate hostels available for girls and boys. One more thing is that this college is situated in an open environment. All types of instruments are available in the labs, and they are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Indus Institute of Technology and Management.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not good on the college campus. If you can clear interview so can join after an interview in the company. The college placed some students in Hyundai workshop in Faridabad. At the admission time, they promise for 100%, but it's the only a rumour, overall is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus has good infrastructure, and infrastructure is a copy of IIT Kanpur with separate boys and girls hostel. There is one cafeteria in separate campus mess for girls, boys and teachers. The computer lab is very authenticated with projector-camera class, and every class have seventy to hundred student capacity.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This is a private institute affiliated to Dr A P J Abdul Kalam Lucknow University.

review_content.Placements: The placement of the seniors was good and about 70-80% of the students were selected in the campus placement. The stipend that was offered to the students was about Rs. 4-5 lacks per annum. The companies like Mahindra, Traquer, Dhenuka, Seahock have visited the campus. And, according to the development of the knowledge and skills during the tenure, the salary was offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has absolutely every facility such as the Wi-Fi facility, the labs, effective classrooms, proper library and medical facilities provided. The environmental conditions of the campus are too good for the students to increase their overall skills. The indoor and the outdoor games such as cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, carrom, chess, etc., are available in the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement, faculty, administration.

review_content.Placements: Good placement. All my mates and I got placed in different company companies that came to the college, like Genpact, TRAQR, Dhanuka Electrotech, Maruti, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is good in all things. The college satisfies all the criteria which are required for it to be the best college. A good area for all sports- badminton court, football ground, cricket ground; all labs- civil, mechanical, CSE, EC, etc. There's also a civil park built by the students of civil. The campus has the best environment and a large area.

The institute offers admission in 270 seats of B.E. / B.Tech.

courses_data.description: TheAfter 10th DiplomaatIndus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur)is a 3 years programme offered to the students in the field of Engineering. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in JEECUP. Students can choose from 3 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Production Engineering and Mechanical Engineering among others. To complete the Indus Institute of Technology and Management (IITM Kanpur) admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 1,00,800.

Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the MBA/PGDM programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

The lowest the cutoff rank the highest is the competition and vice versa.

content.Placements: The highest package is 75 LPA in Dubai, and the average package is 7 LPA. At every branch, the students get a job. content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure with wholly Wi-Fi campus and nice facilities. The outlook of infrastructure is damn amazing, while the facility helps to grow ourselves in a much better way, the labs are very well-equipped. Even the CSE lab is newly equipped with new computers.

content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful and good. The teaching quality is good. We can ask them about any problem related to the study. They are always available to solve our problems. Exams are not much difficult. If you work hard, you can easily score good marks. I secured 70%.

Following the previous year's schedule, St. Aloysius Institute of Technology (SAIT JBP) JEE Main cutoff 2024 will start releasing the round-wise cutoff lists tentatively in the month of Jan.

St. Aloysius Institute of Technology (SAIT JBP) cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 827590 and 967092 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 827590, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.

reviews.review_text: This college has a garden area, bike and scooty standing area are also provided. There are two separate hostels for boys and girls, and also has good connectivity, and a Wi-Fi connection. It also provides a science laboratory and computer and also has a big library. It provides a personal bus for students. Sports and games and have a great infrastructure and the college campus is clean.

reviews.review_heading: Students here work hard and experience collectors.
reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure was good, labs, libraries, auditorium, gym, and canteen facilities were satisfying. Hostel rooms were quite spacious, and maintaining hygiene is a personal choice. If you get injured or sick, the warden and other faculty members will come for help positively.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the place is nice and disciplined.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. There are good computer labs. It is one of the top colleges in Jabalpur and good food available in the canteen. There are various sports organised in college. There is a big library which has almost a lot of important books.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was really awesome, and we are very happy to have studied there. All the classrooms were well developed and extremely awesome. The hostel facility in our college was really good. The bus facility is also available, and it was really good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members. Great placements in 2017. Fantastic infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is good enough but it really needs improvements, labs are absolutely fantastic, classrooms have more space & there's electric appliances are good, library is fabulous, medical facilities are available there, they have their own sports ground & sports kits are quite cool. The food quality is normal at canteen. Rooms of hostels are good it have more space. Overall infrastructure is fantastic.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching faculty and good management of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good. Entire campus is a full Wi-Fi zone. High-speed internet speed is available. Labs and classrooms are furnished. Labs have proper working equipment the latest technologies installed in computers with updates software. Food in the canteen is delicious afterall it is the place the enitre college hangouts. Hostel facility is available within the campus for both boys and girls separately. Hostels have 2,3 and 5 seater rooms with quality food and playground for...

reviews.review_heading: I'd say average overall, as I didn't get placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure-wise, it's the best in Jabalpur as per my knowledge. It is located in a very good location, which is also a benefit. A big library is there. There are good labs for the mechanical branch. Many colleges can't afford machines required to teach, and here, you'll get many. At my time, they didn't complete their building work, so I think now, it is at its best.

College faculty and staff is good and also, labs are well-equipped but the college only lacks in terms of placement. There is no experienced placement team and the college does not have any good placement records. The companies visited to the college are mostly fake. The highest package in my batch was only 2.4 LPA and in the year 2015, it was only 2.24 LPA only to a single student. courses are pretty decent and the syllabus is upto date .. and the teachers are very good towards students.. classrooms are nice and clean.. but college got very less number of washrooms

There is no hostel facility till my knowledge but there are hostels infront of college

reviews.review_text: Our college has only 1 building, which includes courses like BE, MCA, ITI, kindergarten and B.Com, which are going simultaneously together. It is a business by exploiting students. They only want money. Library and computer labs are filled with spider webs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, as it provides good placement opportunities for students.

content.Placements: In CSE, around 75-80% of students got placed in good companies. I got placed in 3 companies, HCL, Accenture, and Cognizant. Roles offered were full-stack developer, cloud architect, DevOps engineer, blockchain engineer, software architect, bigdata engineer, Internet of Things (IoT) solutions architect, data scientist, etc. The highest package offered was 6.75 LPA, the lowest package was 3 LPA, and the average package was 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms and library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The infrastructure plays a vital role in the development of the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good Engineering College .

content.Placements: Speaking of Placements, some companies visit every year and select few. Such as TCS, Hexaware and much more. Around 45% people get placed in top tier companies. However the first batch will be out next year, the coming academic year and hope many will get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has good facilities such as Wi-Fi and other tech facilities. The laboratories are well-equipped and there are 2 to 3 laboratories for each branch, for example CSE has around 3 laboratories on each floor. Speaking of library, it has all related books and have minimum of 4 copies each.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: There are excellent infrastructure and facilities here.

content.Placements: Less than 10 students got placed in the core field from the mechanical branch. The lowest salary package offered here is 1.2 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The top recruiting company for our course is Design Tech Pune. Very few students or less than 10 students got internships from here. The top role offered in our course is design engineer (GET). Placements of other branches are good compared to mechanical engineering.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi facility with limited access to data. Labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms and infrastructure are good. Classrooms have sufficient space. The hostel is built newly with all the facilities. The food served here is quite average. It is a bit difficult to get medical facilities as our college is situated outside the city. Sports like table tennis, carrom, handball, etc., are played here.

reviews.review_heading: There are excellent infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility with limited access to data. Labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms and infrastructure are good. Classrooms have sufficient space. The hostel is built newly with all the facilities. The food served here is quite average. It is a bit difficult to get medical facilities as our college is situated outside the city. Sports like table tennis, carrom, handball, etc., are played here.

reviews.review_heading: Good and friendly environment in the campus.
reviews.review_text: As I said that the college is newly constructed we have a good infrastructure and we also have all the facilities which are helpful for the students. But we don't have a proper canteen system to the college as they are changing the canteen owners frequently so the students are facing many problems due to this.

reviews.review_heading: Good priority is given to every student in our college, with good teaching and best caring.
reviews.review_text: There is no free Wi-Fi. Labs are good, with components. The lab staff is also very supportive. And, we can experiment as many times as we want. Classroom are very big. Library has more than 1500 books. The quality of labs is pretty good. There are both white and blackboard as per convenience. The quality of food this year was not good, but they are putting their efforts to increase the quality of food. We face little infrastructure issues in labs, but staff is trying to fix it.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college. You can learn very well here. They provide good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs, classrooms, library, sports, and playground, etc., are available here. Each lab consists of 40 PCs. All the labs have very good equipment. We have projectors in our classrooms, and each classroom can accommodate 200 students. Every year, they conduct the cricket tournament other sports activities in our playground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with low fee charges.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were the best in our college as all the students and teachers were friendly. Food can be rated 7 out of 10. Breakfast was very good but dinner was not good. Students can play games regularly. I was very satisfied with this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with average infrastructure, campus life, and below average placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was average. Hostel facility was not provided in our college but they provided PG for girls outside the college. It is a bit far from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jain College, Belagavi.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library and Wi-Fi for computer or laptop users.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent and fully satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: Excellent library with a limited number of but high-quality books. You can use the labs at your own pace and spend time working on projects. Most of the time, students spend time in their labs doing stuff. The library has a good amount of space to sit and read and get resources.

reviews.review_heading: It's a pretty good college for engineering at low cost.
reviews.review_text: As it is a recently built college, the infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are well-maintained and labs are well-equipped. Cleanliness and discipline are maintained in the campus. The canteen of the college is not that good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Seemanta Engineering College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. review_content.Placements: Placements are not so good in our college. They don't call a lot of companies for placements and for internships. Not even 50% of students got placed in mechanical engineering. I don't recall a single student who had an internship. The college faculty did call 1-2 companies but they didn't offer a decent money for a bachelor's degree student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom and college infrastructure is very good. We do have a good lab for practical work. The college is clean and hygienic. The hostel is also very good. review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, so many facilities are available like free Wi-Fi network in the college campus available every day. overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Seemanta Engineering College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Seemanta Engineering College is around INR 79500 - INR 291000.

review_summary.college_name: Seemanta Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placement and good faculty members.

content.Placements: You will be placed if you are even an average student but don't think for big companies you will get jobs in decent companies with a good package. In my year 80% of students were placed with an average of 3-4 LPA package. The top companies were Orient and Mivi. You can get the student's head as per your academic records.
content.Infrastructure: For labs, there is AC in the computer lab and free Wi-Fi is also there but in classes, you will get normal fans. You can read thousands of books in the library. In the hostel, food will be served daily and you will get food routine-wise, different food for different days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It offers good placement opportunities at a reasonable fee.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of our seniors got good placements, with the highest salary package of 60 LPA. The mechanical branch got approximately 70% placements. The IT department got the best placements as usual, but you do not need to worry about the campus placements even if you are in other branches.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and materials are very good here. Be it the library, Wi-Fi, or the canteen food, you will not be disappointed. The hostel is quite neat and clean. You can adjust there. You can roam freely around the campus as there are no restrictions, which is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Seemanta Engineering College.

content.Placements: Placements are not so good in our college. They don't call a lot of companies for placements and for internships. Not even 50% of students got placed in mechanical engineering. I don't recall a single student who had an internship. The college faculty did call 1-2 companies but they didn't offer a decent money for a bachelor's degree student.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom and college infrastructure is very good. We do have a good lab for practical work. The college is clean and hygienic. The hostel is also very good. The only thing that lacks here is that we don't have a digital class yet. Everything else is nice and good. The library is good too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Explore yourself at Seemanta Engineering College.

content.Placements: 60% of the students got placed from our course. The salary package offered in our course ranges from 1.5 LPA-6 LPA. About 30% of the students got internships from our course, and top companies offer internships here. They are also very careful about fake companies.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, so many facilities are available like free Wi-Fi network in the college campus available every day. Every lab is available like a computer lab, workshop, Physics lab, Chemistry lab, etc. , and all the labs are good and comfortable. There is seperate lab for linux, phython, c, c+, Java, Networking etc. Our campus canteen and hostel is fully Hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and should be known to everyone.

content.Placements: Students who score a minimum of 50% in their 12th are eligible to join this course. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in this course are Wipro and Tata. To get a better internship, students must have atleat 70% marks and he/she can able to get an internship in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of the hostel are very good. The hostel has Wi-Fi rooms and a hygienic environment. The mess food and facilities are also good and they follow hygienic norms. The mess superintendent is very much friendly and they always give students the perfect meals so that students can be healthy.

In 4th year it'll be 2. I have found issues like water problem.

reviews.review_heading: The beauty of our college.

I love the library of my college. The games are also done in our college at regular intervals. That is a good part.

reviews.review_heading: Seemanta Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is the best infrastructure, superb workshop with 6-7 lathe machine, shape and other machines. There are separate workshops for all the semesters. Furnace and all are available for casting. I have done the project on casting there only. There are supportive lab assistants who help during the practicals.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for engineering at affordable money with some quality teachers.

The classrooms are good and also have the CCTV cameras in all the classrooms, and it is a good thing too. The library is average, and sports and games department is awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The best college in terms of placements and knowledge.

review_content.Placements: The placement of the college has very good placement records as compared to another college in the area. The college is just opposite to Jindal steels, so they are the frequent visitors for the placement and the summer internship in the college. For other branches like CSE and ECE, the most visitors are HCL, TCS, Wipro. In the last year, the maximum package of placement was gone to 15 lakhs per annum, and the minimum was 4.5 lakhs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure, and its surrounding is full of greenery and beautiful trees. The canteen of the college is the best for the food even you are away from home. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are fully equipped with the digital projectors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: College life as expected by each and every student. I had a lot of memories in the college

review_content.Placements: Speaking about placements in the college, a number of companies visited the college to offer jobs. The maximum number of students were placed in the first round of the campus drive. Companies like Genpact, Logictech, etc offered jobs. I was selected for Logictech and was offered the profile of R&D intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was up to the mark. We had a huge playground in all the surrounding colleges. The hostels were very spacious and the classrooms were also very spacious and well-ventilated. The cafeteria was the most loved place in the college. We had a huge library where students got a wide range of books to enrich their knowledge.

review_summary.college_name: Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The review of Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are not that good. Only a few companies visited the campus for placements. Companies like Genpact and some robotics companies visited the campus at the end of the placement season. Roles like software engineer and some internships are offered. Around 30% of the students get placed from our college. The placement cell is operational, and they were not able to provide efficient placement opportunities. They are even not able to bring a good number of companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Both the girls' and boys' hostels were available on the campus. Classrooms were okay, but they weren't air-conditioned. Quality of the food offered was good. Hostel rooms were good, and the college also provides the gym facility. The rooms are allocated on the double occupancy basis. I didn't face any issues related to the infrastructure of our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: This was a good institute during my tenure, 2013.

content.Placements: Some of our seniors and some from my batch got hired by private companies. Dean said the best private companies would take a bribe to visit the campus for placements, and that is the reason we all got placed by our own and not from college in the companies like Infosys, Sony, Jaypee Cements, Jindal Pipes, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The whole campus and hostel were fully enabled with Wi-Fi facility. Medical facilities were good inside and outside the college because there was a hospital beside my college. Every day, there are games for hostel boys, for example, volleyball, cricket, and indoor games like carrom, chess, table tennis, and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The best college in terms of placements and knowledge.

content.Placements: The placement of the college has very good placement records as compared to another college in the area. The college is just opposite to Jindal steels, so they are the frequent visitors for the placement and the summer internship in the college. For other branches like CSE and ECE, the most visitors are HCL, TCS, Wipro. In the last year, the maximum package of placement was gone to 15 lakhs per annum, and the minimum was 4.5 lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure, and its surrounding is full of greenery and beautiful trees. The canteen of the college is the best for the food even you are away from home. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are fully equipped with the digital projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: College life as expected by each and every student. I had a lot of memories in the college

content.Placements: Speaking about placements in the college, a number of companies visited the college to offer jobs. The maximum number of students were placed in the first round of the campus drive. Companies like Genpact, Logictech, etc offered jobs. I was selected for Logictech and was offered the profile of R&D intern.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was up to the mark. We had a huge playground in all the surrounding colleges. The hostels were very spacious and the classrooms were also very spacious and well-ventilated. The cafeteria was the most loved place in the college. We had a huge library where students got a wide range of books to enrich their knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The best place to get knowledge from

content.Placements: The placements are average. Mostly, the placements are for the computer science branch. As the college is located near Noida, many companies used to visit from there. Recently, a job fair was conducted by the college and many students were placed in Cyrus group with a good package. The companies that visit mostly are Justdial, Cyrus group, Paytm, and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure and it is famous for its surrounding among the colleges near it. The full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The facility is only for the students, faculty members, and the management staff. The library is the place of worship in the college it is really very beautiful and the environment created there for studies is awesome.

description: Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 945226 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and En

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 945226 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 563927 in 2023 and 773526 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. There are single seater, double seater and triple seater rooms available for students. Common room is available with facilities for Indoor games like table tennis, chess, carom etc. and television set with cable connection. Well equipped modern mess facility is available for the students. Only vegetarian food (not even eggs) is served in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Both the girls' and boys' hostels were available on the campus. Classrooms were okay, but they weren't air-conditioned. Quality of the food offered was good. Hostel rooms were good, and the college also provides the gym facility. The rooms are allocated on the double occupancy basis. I didn't face any issues related to the infrastructure of our college.

reviews.review_heading: This was a good institute during my tenure, 2013.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus and hostel were fully enabled with Wi-Fi facility. Medical facilities were good inside and outside the college because there was a hospital beside my college. Every day, there are games for hostel boys, for example, volleyball, cricket, and indoor games like carrom, chess, table tennis, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in terms of placements and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure, and its surrounding is full of greenery and beautiful trees. The canteen of the college is the best for the food even you are away from home. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are fully equipped with the digital projectors.

reviews.review_heading: College life as expected by each and every student. I had a lot of memories in the college
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college was up to the mark.
We had a huge playground in all the surrounding colleges.
The hostels were very spacious and the classrooms were also very spacious and well-ventilated. The cafeteria was the most loved place in the college. We had a huge library where students got a wide range of books to enrich their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to get knowledge from
reviews.review_text:
The college has a good infrastructure and it is famous for its surrounding among the colleges near it. The full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The facility is only for the students, faculty members, and the management staff.
The library is the place of worship in the college it is really very beautiful and the environment created there for studies is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in NCR. There is a good faculty and a very good infrastructure in the college.
reviews.review_text: VIT has a beautiful building, and all the classes are well air-conditioned. The hostels are also separate for boys and girls. VIT offers an individual room in its hostel, to its students. There is a lot of fun to make oneself healthy through the establishment of the gym and also the food is too good. I just want to say that the infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A very good institute until 2015, known for its prestige and fame but its name degraded slowly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was average. The buildings were nice good classrooms with hi-tech labs, but the Wi-Fi speed was slow as compared to the other colleges of that route. There was a single canteen in the campus, but it was not full of as regular stuff, and the management of the canteen was not good. The hostel has a friendly environment, the warden is supportive and helps the students whenever indeed.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but placement not good.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is good. The college is fully Wi-Fi enabled with separate routers for buildings, office,
hostels. Labs, library, medical facilities, sports, gym, etc. are available.

The library is only available during the college working hours (9:30 am- 5:00 pm). In labs, almost all the required instruments are available, but among those, some are not working properly.
Labs and classrooms are not AC enabled, only the library and computer labs have AC.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not that good.
reviews.review_text: There is not a single college in Delhi NCR in which the infrastructure is bad. We had a library, cafeteria, etc. The playground was not that good, but it was just average. There was a boys and girls hostel, but the condition of the hostel might be good. I don't know because I didn't spend time in the hostel.

review_content.Placements: I'm doing computer science and engineering currently at CKCET; mostly all the students will get placed in this college; if you have skills, you can even get placed in a first-tier company too. Coaching is also very good at this college, providing internships at the end of the second year. The top recruiters are TCS, Zoho, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, high-compatible systems are available in the labs with AC, classroom infrastructure is also very good, hostel rooms are very clean and neat and there are also comfortable rooms available, but no AC rooms are there. faqs.answer: C.K. College of Engineering Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

College of Engineering Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

faqs.answer: C.K. College of Engineering Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. C.K. College of Engineering Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like computer laboratories and Wi-Fi. Hostels and classrooms are average. The food served in the mess is good. Medical facilities are good. Our college has a playground for sports. The library has old books. Students cannot find course-related books in the library. Less than half of the syllabus-related books are present in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It has good teachers and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-maintained, and there is cleanliness all around. It has Wi-Fi and computer labs. Hostel facilities are also very good. It has all the medical facilities. It has indoor as well as outdoor games like chess, carrom and table tennis. Inter sports competition is also done every year.

reviews.review_heading: Not recommended at all to good students.
reviews.review_text: There labs which are decent in size and there's workshop as well. For games there are cricket, badminton table tennis, basketball, football ground facilities swimming pool isn't there. There's just one hostel and it's for boys only where rooms are very small, max occupancy is 2 students per room you'll get air cooler, fan, curtains, B.Ed chair provided in hostel rooms bathrooms are very dirty they are rarely cleaned. Wi-Fi is there for hostel students speed is very poor, there no LAN connection....

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in a very good location, and it is opposite the highway. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, and the library is also not good. Hostel facilities are also not good on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of campus placements and education quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was excellent. College building looked pretty good. Classrooms were awesome to sit. But there was high electricity cut off. I would say that our college had the best infrastructure in Alwar. It was clean & good. I am satisfied with the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text:
1. Well furnished classrooms with properly working AC'S. Free Wi-Fi facilities to the students of the college. 
2. The quality of the facilities of hostel is very good and the food available in the mess and canteen is too hygienic. And in sports also there is a good faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is awesome, and good discipline is also maintained here.
reviews.review_text: Buildings in our college are good, but it looks like they are closely packed. The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facilities. Our classrooms are well-designed. We have a library, but it has old books. The quality of our labs is really awesome. No sports facilities are available for the students. The canteen available here is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: NIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the only best thing about this college. A cricket ground, volleyball ground, basketball court are available in the college. The library is available, where you can hardly get the famous authors book for the better content. The worse part is that it's a Wi-Fi campus, but no student or not a single faculty member has access to Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members here are very supportive.
reviews.review_text:
There are awesome classrooms, library, canteen and hostel, cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court and badminton court.
NIET is the only college in Alwar with a beautiful infrastructurel which is eco-friendly. My college has the most beautiful infrastructure in Alwar.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with my college about the management and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my college were very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facility, sports and games. The quality of labs was very good all equipment were available in my college labs. The classrooms were well designed with proper ventilation, and the quality of food in my college canteen was not that good. The hostel rooms were very good.  I didn't face infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is quite good. All the labs are equipped with modern equipment. The classrooms are okay with CCTVs installed all over the campus. A 
dedicated basketball ground, volleyball courts, and cricket ground are there on the campus. Facilities for other games such as badminton, table tennis, etc. are also present.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average it is not a fully Wi-Fi connected campus, All equipment are damaged in the labs, but the classrooms are in better conditions. There are no medical facilities in the campus and no sports facilities here. An annual sports day is celebrated every year. Low-quality food will be available in the hostel mess and in the canteen. The hostel is very congested as 3 students in a single room is compulsary.

review_summary.college_name: Kanad Institute of Engineering & Management - KIEM Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placement they offer here.

content.Placements: College is nice and situated in a nice place. Most of the students are placed in big companies like Tata, Hyundai, and Mahindra. The college offers many placements, and students choose further study to complete their B.Tech. College offers many courses and placements in jobs.
content.Infrastructure: College has many labs, classrooms, and one library. In library, you can borrow books by showing your library card. College offered a hostel along with food available but chargeable. The infrastructure is good, and medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements, infrastructure, faculty members, etc.

content.Placements: The student's capacity is 120. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, CTS, Capgemini, etc. Many of them get internships. Many things that students learn here are entrepreneurship development which builds their confidence and it reflects on-campus interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, hostel food is also good, and canteen facilities are available. The food quality is good, there is a different hostel for boys and girls, and rooms are also suitable. Many precautions are taken in the time after the pandemic season.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: KIEM, Mankar - A good option but maybe not the best.

content.Placements: The position in our bunch was neither too extraordinary nor excessively awful. The college give the understudies preparing for better situation openings. The proportion of set of students placed to non placed student was an average. Organisations like Tech Mahindra, IFB, Infoway, Gemini Communication Ltd. came here for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a great infrastructure for engineering students. The only drawback of the college is that it is placed in the remote location of Mankar which is quite hard to reach specially during summer when its too hot and during monsoon when there is mud all over.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Kanad Institute of Engineering and Management is very good.

content.Placements: Placements for our batch were average. The college provided placement training for students to have better placement opportunities. The ratio of placed student to non-placed student is average. Companies like Tech Mahindra, Infoway, IFB, Gemini Communication Ltd. etc., visited the campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in Mankar. It is a remote location, and it might be quite difficult to reach the college. The infrastructure of our college is average for an engineering college. Sports and games are conducted in college at regular intervals which are quite fun and relaxing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Kanad Institute of Engineering & Management.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed as the HOD of various departments and the rest of them tried off-campus. The highest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA and the lowest salary package was 1.5 LPA. Students tried internships by themselves. Project engineer, site engineer, and graduate engineer trainee were the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college were the best and the infrastructure was good. Food was served accordingly. Classrooms and medical facilities were good. Wi-Fi was provided in the library. Private shops were available on campus.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Well-built college in the segment best and best in rural areas like in its location.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure and facilities available, the college is the segment's best in nearby cities, with good infrastructure built and well-built classrooms. It also has a library with both digital and book libraries. So overall, the infrastructure and facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Smt Kamala and Sri Venkappa M. Agadi College of Engineering & Technology - SKSVMACET.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college was also good. Facilities available in our course department were Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, etc. for the students. College campus was quite big and beautiful. Food available in the college canteen was tasty and at a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: A very helpful management.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well maintained infrastructure. The classrooms in the college are big and airy. The labs of the college are developed and have all the required equipments. Students has access to the Wi-Fi in the college campus. The food in the hostel mess and college canteen is good and tasty to eat. The hostel management is very friendly and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good with a clean environment and good teachers. It is the best college for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a canteen, and huge playgrounds. The quality of the food in the hostel is good. The digital library is available in our college. Our college provides free Wi-Fi from morning to evening.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study in.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good for students. Food served in the hostel is very good. Special food is served once a week. Hostel rooms are very good and sufficient for students to read.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college with a good infrastructure. It has a good library and a friendly environment. It has many books. There is a digital library with a good internet connection. I am a day scholar. Some of my friends stay in the hostel, and they like it very much.

reviews.review_heading: It's good that it's in a rural place, which helps students concentrate, and the campus is great.
reviews.review_text: The digital library provides free Wi-Fi, and it is clean. We have a hospital nearby, which is good. Classrooms are clean. Hostels provide free Wi-Fi for students, which helps them to study while they are in the hostels. It is great. They give Sophos ID.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available in our college is very good and well structured. Wi-Fi facility is there. Library is very good to learn. In your hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good. Sports and games are also good. We have 6 labs and each lab have Wi-Fi. Printers and scanner. But we have a great canteen and campus and my college fests are also great
.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college as well as hostel premises as the great environment is maintained.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus has a Wi-Fi connection and the labs are well-equipped with good teaching faculty. The classrooms are good. The library is the key attention of the college as it has a very good source in the whole district. There is a digital library where there are computers and can make use of them. There is a big ground where we can find all types of grounds and courts for all games.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and a better environment to study.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the required lab. College library has tons of books. College provides a subscription to Lakhs of book. A digital library is available. And a big conference room for students. For any medical assistance, the college has there own hospital.

reviews.review_heading: The college should work on bringing highly paying companies and try to place all the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good as the management plays an important role in its development. I would rate it 3 out of 5. The campus is huge and has a separate playground. A digital library with Wi-Fi and LAN facilities is provided for students. More than 400 PCs are available. I am not facing any issue regarding the infrastructure of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Student-friendly campus and faculty. The best engineering college with low fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very clean and eye-catching infrastructure. We have separate hostels for boys and girls. Hygienic canteen and mess facilities are available. A big conference hall and advanced labs are also available. A library with 1,000s of books is present in the college. Also, students can access millions of online books using the digital library facility. Both the college and hostel Wi-Fi facilities are active 24*7. A cyber lab with lots of computers and free internet facility is also a...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure of the college, lectures are very good care takers of students.
reviews.review_text: There is well infrastructure for each branches. Clean and hygiene is maintained. There is a digital library, & there is a Book Bank Scheme were we can get one full semester books for a sem which is under the lowest prize then it can be given back. Cafeteria is small but attractive. All types of civil construction can be seen in this campus.

reviews.review_heading: We are proud for getting good quality education in rural area.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have Wi-Fi facility available in the college. We have a digital library which will be useful for us for studies. The facilities like hostels are also available in the college. The classroom environment is very good with good teachers. Overall, the college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy for joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The college is enabled with free Wi-Fi, all the students and staff can access it. The college has a digital library. Every classroom is provided with projectors for digital studies. The college has topped many of the sports events in VTU region, and also hosted some of the sports in VTU region.

reviews_list.review_title: My personal experiences with faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 70+ students in my section. After completing this course, the average salary is 40,000. The lowest salary is 20,000 per month. There is an internship present in the hospital also for this course. My few friends from senior batches got an internship in PIMS Hospital in Jalandhar.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 26,000 per year and 3,000 per month for the mess. There is a room for 4 or 3 students. Every student has different beds and study tables provided by the college. Sports and games are also available in the hostel and college. The mess food has good quality and hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: LKCTC has good infrastructure and faculty. It needs to provide more industry exposure to students.

review_content.Placements: Internship opportunities start from the 5th or 6th semester. Most of companies that visited my college were based in Mohali and Chandigarh. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. The job roles offered included frontend developer, backend developer, full-stack developer, and cybersecurity. A total of 80%-85% of the students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were quite spacious and hygienic. There were programming labs, and library was filled with many books, 80% of which were related to the courses, while the rest focused on personality development. As I lived in the same city, I never opted for the hostel, but the girls' hostel had good infrastructure, and the food was okay. In terms of sports, they had a national-level girls' hockey team.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty and studies college gives us school feeling instead of college.

content.Placements: Very few students are placed, likely 10%. The highest package is 8 LPA, the average is 3 to 4 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top companies are Netsmartz, AOSC Technologies, and Sensation Software Solutions. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Quality Analyst, Associate Manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. Classrooms are furnished properly. Labs are okay, with some PCs working and some not, and Wi-Fi facility is only available in the labs. Well, I'm not a hosteller, so I don't know about the hostel facilities, but I have heard that the food in the mess is good and can be eaten.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: You will receive quality teaching, but it is mostly theoretical with very few placement offers.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students were placed. The highest package was 8 LPA, the average package was 4 LPA and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. All the companies that participated were startups, and there was not a single top recruiting company. Only 5 to 10% of students secured internships, and those were primarily with lesser-known companies such as Sensation Software, Aosc Technologies, and Pisoft. The roles offered included software developer, web developer, and quality analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were okay but in some classrooms, the projector was not working, and in some AC not working. The library was good but had limited books, coming to labs the PCs were not working properly and Wi-Fi was only accessible for labs but not for personal use. I was not a hosteller in my college so I don't know about the hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college has average placements. Top recruiting companies do not visit our campus. Around 25 to 30 companies visit the college. Around 60% to 70% of students are placed. Most of the companies come from Chandigarh.

reviews.review_text: Sports grounds are available for playing games. We have a basketball court, a badminton court, a hockey court, and a volleyball court at our college. Our college has four buildings.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in Jalandhar for Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well furnished benches and alters are well maintained, students have Wi-Fi access, the Wi-Fi speed is approximately 25 megabite per second, hostels are semifurnished all needy items for a student are there, all facilities like medical, sports are there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good in all aspects whether in placements or in facilities .
reviews.review_text:
There are myriad facilities available in college as well as in hostel. College have all types of facilities such as Wi-Fi libraries computers labs and many more other things. 
Interestingly, college have designed labs for all streams and for all subjects .

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college for study.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very neat and clean and every room is filled with AC, labs, and Wi-Fi are also available to complete your project. The quality of food is also good in the hostel as I have listened I am not sure because I have never tasted of food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college has good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not on the campus of the engineering college but is present in a nearby college, Lyallpur Khalsa College Jalandhar. The infrastructure of the hostel is average, and the food in the mess is very bad. You have to enter the hostel before 9 p.m.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about the college is good, including faculty members and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is given by the college. In every room, there are desks and dice. Every room has four fans and two air conditioners. The main problem is that they don't have their own hostel for boys. They send their boys to the main Khalsa College campus for hostels, and the food provided in the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with some benefits.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities are available at our college. There is a Wi-Fi facility. There are air-conditioned rooms, computer science labs, etc. There is an average-quality mess. The facilities provided in the college hostel are average. The sports facilities are good, and our college provides indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college to explore yourself.
reviews.review_text: All departments in the college have their labs. The classrooms have 2 A/Cs. The library is huge and has all the books required for studies. Students can issue books for 14 days. There is also a ground where students play hockey, volleyball and basketball. Wi-Fi facility and canteens are also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are fully air-conditioned classrooms, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are air-conditioned libraries and fully equipped labs. Classrooms have all the required facilities. Quality of food available is also good. Hostel rooms are good. There are grounds for basketball, volleyball and hockey. I'm not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good here but less chances of placement and infrastructure are also good.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good there. We have well furnished classroom with ACs but Wi-Fi is only available in labs. Some PCs in labs are also not working. 
As I am not a hosteller so I don't know about that. Not much medical facilities are there. No scope for sports. The canteen is okay, not much good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to join.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best faculty members. All classrooms are well-maintained. Our college has Wi-Fi. The internet speed is the best.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: For a restricted number of seats direct admission to Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering (SVCE) is normally feasible through the management quota. Students who might not have passed the regular entrance tests or merit based selection procedures can nevertheless be admitted using this method. faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Since Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering (SVCE) is a prestigious school with a stellar academic reputation, entrance might be hard. Undergraduate programme admissions, especially in well-known fields like computer science, electronics and mechanical engineering, are frequently determined by a candidates performance on national exams like JEE (for some seats) or the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counseling process which takes into account grades from the 12th grade. Cutoffs at the college are typically high particularly for students in the general category. Nonetheless there is a considerable probability that someone with a strong academic record and an excellent entrance exam performance will be admitted to SVCE.

As a student of SV College, I can say that food available in mess and canteen is tasty. The hostels are provided for both boys and girls separately. The college is active in arranging sports and games for students regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an excellent infrastructure. The facilities provided in our college are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I’m happy with the college facilities. Faculty members are friendly, and the environment is good.
reviews.review_text: The library and labs were good. The hostel felt very much like home, and the food was good. It was a peaceful place for study, and every morning and evening, we played sports and games. All kits were available and very useful for me and my friends. We played games like cricket, volleyball, tennis, and basketball.

overview_faqs.question: Why is College of Engineering and Rural Technology so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: The College of Engineering and Rural Technology (CERT) has earned an excellent reputation for quality technical education, particularly in the rural belts. It is famous for offering a range of undergraduate and postgraduate engineering programmes with a thrust on practical, industry-oriented skill learning. All this is tied together by the strength of the faculty, modern infrastructure, and research and innovation. In addition to this, the placement cell is very active for the students in CERT, and the institution collaborates with different industries. It provides excellent employment opportunities for its students. Moreover, since it delivers affordable education, its mission to uplift rural students further adds up to its prominence.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering and Rural Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Value for Money and placement.

content.Placements: About 70% students got placed. The lowest is for 3LPA and the highest is for 12LPA. Average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Amazon, Flipkart and Teach Mahendra. About 70 percent students got internship from campus in Tech Mahendra, Zintech pvt, Cisco, Tata, Amazon and Flipkart. Top roles offered are Software engineer, Data scientist, Data analyst, Full Sack Developer, Front end developer, Web Developer and Machine engineer.
content.Infrastructure: All the basic facilities are provided such as Lab, Wi-Fi, Library, etc. Some facilities such as Online classes, Helpdesk through WhatsApp, Central library and Separate Labs for CSE students also provided. All facilities are provided for Hostelers such as mess, medical and Library and food quality is also excellent or value for money. Also helpline for Hostelers is provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering and Rural Technology.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements. The placement cell was good. About 60-80% of students got placed. Top recruiting companies like HCL, Tata, Infosys, etc., visited our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel provided good facilities. Rooms were cleaned well. The food quality in the mess was good. Air-conditioners were available in classrooms. A library was available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were helpful and well-trained. Our teachers cleared our doubts. Exams were conducted semester-wise. Semester exams were easy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I recommend CERT for a better future.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students got placed this year. The maximum package offered is about 10 LPA, which is good. The minimum package is 4-5 LPA. HCL, Capgemini and many more companies came to our college.
content.Infrastructure: Good quality computer labs and a well-settled library are available with good space, and most of the books are available. The campus is neat and clean. Good Wi-Fi is available on campus. The hostel and canteen and other facilities are good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant and makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not so hard, and the pass percentage is about 100%.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all the departments, and I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 150 students get passed from our batch. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. About 70% of the students got placed in our college. About 70% of the students from our course got an internship. All the students got placed in reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the necessary facilities for students. The college offers a good atmosphere. The college provides hostel facility for both boys and girls separately. Quality of food served in our college mess is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of our college is good, but the placement opportunities are very less.

content.Placements: Placements for the civil engineering department are very poor. I don't know about other departments, but only one company has visited the campus to hire civil engineering students. The name of the company that visited the campus to hire civil students was Lintech, and it has offered a salary of Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. Around 12-13 students got placed in the company after the written test and interview. The companies asked everyone to pay Rs. 1,000-1,500 as the registration fee and gave the students a letter. But on the day of joining, they asked for more money, and this is how everyone was fooled. Students refused to join that company and asked the college for the refund.

paragraphs: College of Engineering and Rural Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, College of Engineering and Rural Technology considers scores in JEE Main, CUET-PG, and JEECUP for admission to specific courses.College of Engineering and Rural Technologyoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,44,800 - 2,53,600. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,28,000 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
