highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology?

review_content.General: In my college all categories of students are allowed to take admission. The highest package in my college was 6 LPA and the lowest package was 4 LPA. There are many companies such as Elecon, Wipro, L&T, etc., that appear for placements in my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities available in my college such as high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. There are different types of labs as per the selected branch of students. There is a total of 125 classrooms in my college and there is a library in which all the books are available with the latest editions in the market.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied everything is well and good. You can go for DJMIT.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed in good and reputed companies, whereas many students are pursuing further studies abroad. Most companies asks for practical knowledge and here, your practical as well as theoretical knowledge is enhanced, which helps a lot in future.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is an e-library also available where students can practice their practicals in their free time. Wi-Fi is also available in library, college and hostel. Students can also visit labs in their free time and perform their work. All sports and games are played as well as required things are provided. Medical facilities are good as far. Food facilities for hostel students is not worse but can be improved.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is quite good with affordable fees.

review_content.Placements: Placements are quite low. During our course, placements are not provided due to covid. Still, the batch above our course got good placements with the highest salary package of 4.1 LPA. Mostly, top companies like Tata, Adani, Elecon, TCS and MRF visit here to offer roles for the employee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and our college is in Charotar, so the atmosphere is lush green. Labs are available with basic engineering equipment, and workshops are equipped with machine tools. Hostels are very good, with 3 beds in a room with attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi and mineral water.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provide best facilities and also best faculty. All the teachers are well educated.

content.Placements: Last year, 90 percent of our students were able to get an internship. This year even more companies are coming to our college and providing opportunities in different fields. The college is also very supportive and helps students through difficult times. Some companies even provide job offers after the internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a wife facility, proper technical lab, and computer lab with AC facilities. The college also has a food court and hostel facility, which helps students live peacefully.
content.Faculty: The faculty is very helpful and will help us through our entire college career. The course curriculum provides all the information we need for the entire semester including the exam schedule. The circular also provides information about the course and the exam which helps me gain knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My point of view about my college.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't have a lot of companies coming for placements, and sometimes none at all. However, the college does suggest some companies for internships, and our faculty helps us get those internships. Most of the offers go to students in the Computer and IT branches, as those are the most in-demand right now. Students in other branches also get offers, but they are fewer in number.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good, not the best but still good. It has all the necessary facilities, like a library, washrooms, laboratories, classrooms, cafeteria, etc. The hostel rooms are also quite good, and students don't feel uncomfortable living in them. The food in the canteen is average but not bad at all.

admission_process.title: Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technology considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and ACPC Admission for admission to specific courses.Dr. Jivraj Mehta Institute Of Technologyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,40,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_text: The college building is of poor quality. The building is not maintained. The building has fire alarms and a water supply for an emergency. The campus is good. Our college provides cricket and volleyball grounds. Not all types of grounds are available here, and they have to work on it.

reviews.review_heading: Really good environment and they provide good knowledge about course you should definitely apply .
reviews.review_text: The environment of my college is very good and my college is classy it provides wife only for hostel students. The labs, classrooms is very clean and there are all equipment are available in labs and all materials available in our college library. I am not stay in hostel. I am doing updown in bus so I don't know about hostel facility but there are sports equipment table tennis, cricket, Carrom as well.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is average, but lab clinics are good and safe. Classrooms are very good, and the library is good. The hostels' quality is neat and clean, and bathrooms are also clean. Medical facilities are average, but all games like cricket and basketball grounds are available.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for good placement then this college is not for you.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided to us by our computer Department is very good. We have well astiblies laboratories and every student can have their personal computer. Food at college canteen is not good but we are provided with good medical, sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided high affordable hostel facility with canteen and Wi-Fi. Rooms are cleaned every day and there was a good study atmosphere in the hostel. Classrooms had CCTV camera facility. Modern labs were available for all branches. Library was also available with 15,000 books with good reading space, chair and table. A canteen was also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I had a worst experience in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has the worst infrastructure ever. You get to see water in your lobby and also in classrooms during rainy seasons. The campus doesn't have a standard playground and parking area for vehicles. There is not even a single lab that is good for students to do an experiment. There is no skilled technician. The instruments are not good. Workshops don't have any safety precaution kit. Around 60% of the machines are in faulty condition.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2018, really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is full Wi-Fi facility in the campus, classrooms are big and of course, there is an air conditioner. Also, we have a big library with Wi-Fi facility. There is a small hospital in my college campus. There is also big ground for football and cricket, separate rooms for table tennis and chess.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Jahangirabad Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jahangirabad Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Com and B.A. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and M.Pharma. Jahangirabad Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Jahangirabad Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 15,000 to 3,10,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Jahangirabad Institute of Technology is a good institution for After 10th Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate, B.E. / B.Tech, D.Pharma, B.Com, B.A, MBA/PGDM, B.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialization at Jahangirabad Institute of Technology are Cinematography, Anchoring & Reporting, Radio Jockeying, Video Editing (Post Production), Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Mechatronics Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Jahangirabad Institute of Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the college and faculty's behavior. Poor education, poor facilities.

review_content.Placements: There's no placement done by the college. Every student found an internship and job through their struggle. As there's no company came for the placement. No idea about the packages. The students who found the job by themselves are getting the package of Rs 15000 to 20000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very poor because our college has dimmed low light classrooms, outdated books in the library, a slow-speed Wi-Fi connection, and many more. Hostel facilities are average. The canteen is available in the college but it is always set to close every time, no sports and game equipment provided to the students. They have to manage their own.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and very affordable college.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of the students got placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is about 1 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is about Rs. 90,000 per annum. Topmost companies are HCL and Eldeco. About 50% of the students got internships in our college. The site engineer role is offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is 24 hours availability of light, and a washing machine is also available on our campus. Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Classrooms are good and unique, and there are also smart classrooms. The library is good, and there are different libraries for different branches. There is 24 hours availability of canteen and ambulance service.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I consider our college better because it provides the best quality education at an affordable price.

review_summary.college_name: Jahangirabad Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 100% placement is provided by the college for final year students. Most students achieve good placement in companies like Cipla, SunPharma, etc. Many roles in pharmacy develop our marketing business, wholesale shop, medical store, and other medical-related jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on our college campus. The labs are very modern, with digital classrooms and a library for studying. The facilities are very polite towards students, and the mess food is very good and delicious. The canteen is also available. A cricket ground and a football ground are available in the college, and many other games are played. Medical facilities are also available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jahangirabad Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Our batch was good. Many companies offered good enough salary packages for us. Top recruiting companies like Coca-Cola, etc., visited our campus. Almost all students got internships. They were offered very good salary packages and they got a very good hike in their salaries.
content.Infrastructure: Students got a very good Wi-Fi experience. The food in the canteen was good and had a good taste. They keep all things fresh.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality of our teachers was excellent. When you asked them about something, they simply tried to explain it to you in the simplest way possible. The semester exams were very helpful to students in improving their knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the college and faculty's behavior. Poor education, poor facilities.

content.Placements: There's no placement done by the college. Every student found an internship and job through their struggle. As there's no company came for the placement. No idea about the packages. The students who found the job by themselves are getting the package of Rs 15000 to 20000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very poor because our college has dimmed low light classrooms, outdated books in the library, a slow-speed Wi-Fi connection, and many more. Hostel facilities are average. The canteen is available in the college but it is always set to close every time, no sports and game equipment provided to the students. They have to manage their own.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good and very affordable college.

content.Placements: About 25% of the students got placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is about 1 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is about Rs. 90,000 per annum. Topmost companies are HCL and Eldeco. About 50% of the students got internships in our college. The site engineer role is offered here.
content.Infrastructure: There is 24 hours availability of light, and a washing machine is also available on our campus. Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Classrooms are good and unique, and there are also smart classrooms. The library is good, and there are different libraries for different branches. There is 24 hours availability of canteen and ambulance service.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I consider our college better because it provides the best quality education at an affordable price.

content.Placements: As a final-year student, I am also searching for a job. In tech branches, the percentage of placement is good but during this pandemic, it decreased. Companies like HCL, Head Held High visited the campus, and they provide the software engineer role. College placement is 75% because there is also a reason that it is a private college, so the company has to be invited. I want to choose off-campus placements. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA - 7 LPA.

description: Jahangirabad Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Jahangirabad Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Jahangirabad Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Jahangirabad Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 334342 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 334342 for the general AI quota.
Use the filters provided below to check courses, rounds, and category-wise cutoff ranks:

Jahangirabad Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Jahangirabad Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Jahangirabad Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Jahangirabad Institute of Technology.

As the Jahangirabad Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with the closing ranks of 2109155, 2112372 and , respectively.

reviews.review_text: Facilities available here are like a good amount of books available in the hostel in a separate hostel library. Wi-Fi speed is normal. Classrooms and library are well-maintained. Food quality is average, but the canteen is good. Sports held here are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jahangirabad Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not excellent, but it is good enough as compared with the fee. Wi-Fi and labs are functional, and hostel rooms are maintained. Canteen is also good in terms of cleanliness and pricing of things. Sports courts are also available if you are sporty.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and there are Wi-Fi, labs and a library. Classrooms seats are not much comfortable. I would give 5 stars for hostel facilities as they are very good. Rooms are huge and clean with a separate bathroom for each room. Canteen and mess facilities are average as most of the colleges have. There is a doctor for students for good medical health. Our college also has various aspects of games.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members, poor education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have low lighting, and the labs are not updated with the latest equipment. There are outdated books in the library. The security in the hostel is not good. Many things got stolen from our room when I was at home. The food served is also not good, and there are no many sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: JIT has a very good infrastructure, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, smart classrooms and a library with a lot of interesting and knowledgeable books. Our college provides good medical facilities to its students. JIT has its own medical clinic within the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you're looking for a college of less fee structure, then this college is for you.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the main attraction of our college. The old buildings, the lush green campus provide a view of a farmhouse. Our college consists of 2 academic buildings, three hostel blocks, separate football field and cricket field, etc. Our college building was revamped from the fort of Raja Jahangirabad. There is a mosque in the campus from the 80s. The hostel is Wi-Fi-enabled. The library contains volumes that cover most of the engineering, MBA and media courses. A good canteen is what...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Since it was a fort, the infrastructure is pretty good, some of the buildings are new, and some are 100 years old. If I talk about environment and atmosphere, it is really very good like there is no pollution and it is green everywhere, which everybody likes. We also have also a washing machine and dryer in the hostel and at each block.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the environment of the college but a little improvement in the field of management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is fantastic for studying. Campus is full of greeneries away from the disturbing life of the city with clean and fresh air. Exceptionally calm and friendly environment hostel facility is very comfortable. Academics and curriculum are given the highest preference.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, Dissatisfied with management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of jahagirabad institute of technology is awesome. You I talk about best things of college infrastructure should be on top of the list. It has a Beautiful Masque. In the center of Hostel. It is a FORT of king and it spread 500 akar. It maintain every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's an average college. It is s good college for sincere and self-motivated students.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is good with a clean and green environment. Although located on outskirts of Barabanki city, College has good facilities like internet, food, electricity etc.
The reading room and the library are well-equipped with a lot of books with general and course books as well.

faqs.answer: Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Super placements and helpful faculty.

content.Placements: The placement process of this college is very good. Teachers guided us to get placement. Almost every one of us got a 3-month internship opportunity. It helped us to get placement. Around 85% of students got placed in various companies. The highest package offered was around 16 LPA and the lowest package offered was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is one of the best. The whole campus is very clean. The classrooms are well maintained. There are dedicated labs and a library with a good collection. Wi-Fi facility is available. Our college is yet to provide hostel facilities. There are college buses for transport.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has well-experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: College is very good. We need to move to a walk-in interview. There are no college placements. College was established in 2011. Due to the pandemic, college has been changed, but college is good for studies compared to other colleges. We can get placement through a walk-in interview.
content.Infrastructure: There is no college hostel for boys. College hostel is provided only for girls. College was built in 2011. In girls hostel, they provide one room for 6 members. They provide water heaters and Wi-Fi. There are security cameras. As we go for food they provide breakfast, lunch, tea, and dinner.

paragraphs: Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus considers scores in TS EAMCET, TS POLYCET, and TSICET for admission to specific courses.Sri Chaitanya Technical Campusoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,20,000 - 2,40,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 90,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

description: Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA and MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 45064 and 92217 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the sam

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 45064, 48130 and 49919, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 37807. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 21961, and the 2023 cutoff was 29026 for the aforementioned course and category. hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Chaitanya Technical Campus Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Super placements and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best. The whole campus is very clean. The classrooms are well maintained. There are dedicated labs and a library with a good collection. Wi-Fi facility is available. Our college is yet to provide hostel facilities. There are college buses for transport.

reviews.review_heading: College has well-experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no college hostel for boys. College hostel is provided only for girls. College was built in 2011. In girls hostel, they provide one room for 6 members. They provide water heaters and Wi-Fi. There are security cameras. As we go for food they provide breakfast, lunch, tea, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college in the year 2023.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility we have in our college provides quality food. And it provides fruits during summer days. We have a big playground in our college in which we used to play cricket, volleyball, etc. The food is good, and the medical facility also supports the students at no cost.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, one of the best colleges in karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostels full fill all the basic requirements of the student and the have been rated as above average when compared to all the private hostels that are available for the students in the karimnagar. The hostels of our college possess best food quality.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college does not provide a hostel for boys. There is a library with limited books. Classrooms are spacious. There is no special bus stop for the college and we have to walk some distance from the road. There are labs with limited equipment but they are not working properly.

reviews.review_heading: Personally, I don't recommend this college. It is the worst.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark but they are upgrading now. Labs are okay and they have most of the equipment. Moreover, there is no hostel for boys but there is one for girls. I don't know what facilities they have.

reviews.review_heading: Fee is the only main objective of this college.
reviews.review_text: College is good. But looks like an old building but there is a lot of labs and best ground to play cricket infront of the college but now they are constructing a new compound wall, this will disturb the ground to play and now there is no ground to play.

reviews.review_heading: I'm likely satisfied that the behaviour of our faculty members is good.
reviews.review_text: The food available in our college canteen is very tasty. They provide each and every lab at their respective branches, as well as free Wi-Fi. The college also provides us with a digital library. The books in the library are very useful for our future needs.

reviews.review_heading: It is better for education purposes, but the rest everything is below average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better when compared to college but in the laboratory, equipment is not sufficiently arranged. Students face problems during lab exams. Hostels are provided only for girls. The food served is not proper. Students are suffering a lot because of food, water, and shelter.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed after watching college placement facilities. But satisfied with teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a good library, infrastructure, and classrooms. But there is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Mobile phones are prohibited on campus. The quality of the food served by the canteen is not bad and the mess is very bad. Medical facilities and sports are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty members, and there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, etc., are not available in our college, but labs and classrooms are available. There is a library, but it does not have enough books for students to learn. There is no boys hostel, and there is only a girls hostel. There is one ground for sports like baseball and cricket. The canteen is just average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The infrastructure of the college is excellent. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides more effective knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like labs, library and sports. There is a free space which is enough to organise more events and programmes. Our college puts more efforts to support students to improve their skills and motivate them in their studies. Mostly, we get good knowledge here.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good practical studies and infrastructure. I am satisfied with the teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good speed of Wi-Fi in computer laboratories. We have a few digital classrooms using projectors. There are only girls hostels provided on the campus. According to the hostel students, college management is serving good food to them. There is a first aid service room with all first aid medicines. During weekends students have sports hours.

reviews.review_heading: Good Faculty but no Infrastructure, Very Rare Placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. College is good but the infrastructure is not as expected, there is Wi-Fi but not for students, labs are good with sufficient materials, classroom are maintained clean, the best thing is the library silent and calm.
2. There is no Hostel. Cricket and volleyball are mostly played games.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college and it provides the best memories.

review_content.Placements: COVAS, Udgir has one of the best placements through GVK EMRI which is public-private partnership basis. Students get placed in different pharmaceutical companies like Alembic and Intas. It has diverse branch placements including the poultry industry like Venky. Professors have good connections in the Dairy industry like Gokul Kolhapur, Amul Gujarat, and Rajhans Sangamner. Students can get a package that ranges from 6-10 LPA in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: COVAS, Udgir has the best infrastructure. It has a specialised clinic with various resources like the department of surgery, medicine, and gynecology. There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A balanced review of Mumbai Veterinary College.

review_content.Placements: No companies come to the college for placements. Most students opt for a master's or civil services. Others work in clinics. Others opt for vet-based companies. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. It varies widely. Civil service is the best bet for students. Many work in dairy or animal product companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

review_summary.college_name: Maharashtra Animal and Fishery Sciences University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: More than just a degree - (covas parbhani) experience.

content.Placements: There is a batch of 85 students. The highest package is above 50 LPA. All private companies related to veterinary hire us. We have top government jobs, classes, and one officer like LDO (livestock department officer). We have much scope in this field, it's one of the best medical field types.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is full of greenery and trees, creating a peaceful environment. We have modern e-classrooms, and 3-floor library with all required books. We have separate hostel facilities with a garden, indoor sports rooms, and large playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, football, and more.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You will never regret here after joining.

content.Placements: There are around more than 80 seats for BVSC at NVC Nagpur. All are filled on the basis of NEET marks only. No private colleges and only 6 government colleges in Maharashtra for BVSC hence competition is very low in this field. After completing a degree you can for government jobs including class A officer jobs like L.D.O, V.O, Army (R.V.C), in railway sector, banks, business (poultry/dairy), research, etc. There is a separate placement cell in Mafsu. On average Rs 40,000 per month is minimum and for the highest sky is the limit.
content.Infrastructure: There are good working labs, library too with sufficient books, canteen has hygienic, tasty food. College supports every good extra talent you inert particularly for sports. Cricket, basketball, and badminton are the main games here. Some department labs are somewhat old, there is some more scope for improvement.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college and it provides the best memories.

content.Placements: COVAS, Udgir has one of the best placements through GVK EMRI which is public-private partnership basis. Students get placed in different pharmaceutical companies like Alembic and Intas. It has diverse branch placements including the poultry industry like Venky. Professors have good connections in the Dairy industry like Gokul Kolhapur, Amul Gujarat, and Rajhans Sangamner. Students can get a package that ranges from 6-10 LPA in the final year.
content.Infrastructure: COVAS, Udgir has the best infrastructure. It has a specialised clinic with various resources like the department of surgery, medicine, and gynecology. There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A balanced review of Mumbai Veterinary College.

content.Placements: No companies come to the college for placements. Most students opt for a master's or civil services. Others work in clinics. Others opt for vet-based companies. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. It varies widely. Civil service is the best bet for students. Many work in dairy or animal product companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure is average, but faculties and labs are the best; best placement in government

content.Placements: Veterinary doctor doesn't need to work under someone; he is like the owner of the whole company. There are plenty of private as well as gov jobs which we can apply for. Government jobs: there is a post of livestock development officer for which we need to pass MPSC. There are private jobs like we can work in Vantara and other private firms. They get salaries in 6 digits. Companies like Vantara, saguna foods etc. All students need to do an internship; it is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: This college ranks in the top 5 in Maharashtra and has exemplary records. This college has the greatest infrastructure, well-organised labs, pathology, and physiology labs. The anatomy lab is quite much bigger and better than other colleges. The college hostel is the best to live in, clean, and has very best facilities. There is cleanliness in the campus as well as sports facilities. There is a ground for playing sports. I didn't think the college had any bad aspects. The faculty is of top class, and all faculty members are very much experienced.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, ParbhaniReviewed on 1 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: More than just a degree - (covas parbhani) experience.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is full of greenery and trees, creating a peaceful environment. We have modern e-classrooms, and 3-floor library with all required books. We have separate hostel facilities with a garden, indoor sports rooms, and large playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, football, and more.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 2 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You will never regret here after joining.
reviews.review_text: There are good working labs, library too with sufficient books, canteen has hygienic, tasty food. College supports every good extra talent you inert particularly for sports. Cricket, basketball, and badminton are the main games here. Some department labs are somewhat old, there is some more scope for improvement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, UdgirReviewed on 26 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and it provides the best memories.
reviews.review_text: COVAS, Udgir has the best infrastructure. It has a specialised clinic with various resources like the department of surgery, medicine, and gynecology. There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Bombay Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 11 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A balanced review of Mumbai Veterinary College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 25 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is average, but faculties and labs are the best; best placement in government
reviews.review_text: This college ranks in the top 5 in Maharashtra and has exemplary records. This college has the greatest infrastructure, well-organised labs, pathology, and physiology labs. The anatomy lab is quite much bigger and better than other colleges. The college hostel is the best to live in, clean, and has very best facilities. There is cleanliness in the campus as well as sports facilities. There is a ground for playing sports. I didn't think the college had any bad aspects. The faculty is of top class...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 20 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Nagpur Veterinary College Top notch.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped laboratories and equipments for practical studies are available. Library is available with Wi-Fi for 24 hours and huge room is also there. High teach classrooms with projectors and well maintained hygiene is provided. Hostels are very affordable and good mess food is there. Healthy and tasty food is provided and sports equipments are also there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 26 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have a common study room in this college. There is a sick room on our campus. Guest room is available. Washrooms are better. It is a very good college. There is a decent library in this college. The fee structure is reasonable. Drinking water facility is very good. The waste disposal system is good. Mess is available. Hostel is perfect. The food quality is decent. Every week, doctors visit our hostel. We also have a gym facility in th...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, ParbhaniReviewed on 26 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. Our college has the best library. It has many books. Our college has digital classrooms. They are good. Laboratories are good. They have all the required instruments. All instruments are good. Our college provides a hostel facility for girls and boys.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, ParbhaniReviewed on 7 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Teaching faculty is great .
reviews.review_text:
The library was quite well maintained and had all Wi-Fi internet facilities and all required materials.
The digital classroom is there with Wi-Fi and expert teachers.
Labs are well maintained and also have the new instruments where research material is stored. 
The hostel facilities were good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, ParbhaniReviewed on 7 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided all the facilities like Wi-Fi, the best labs and well-equipped classrooms.  We have the best library with all the books. The hostel had good infrastructure and mess facilities. All the sports were played.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, ParbhaniReviewed on 6 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for veterinary aspirants across Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. A digital classroom is available. The library is well maintained. All the necessary equipment is available in all the departments and labs. The hostel is good. The hostel rooms are huge and clean. Sports facilities are optimal for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, UdgirReviewed on 26 Jan 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, Udgir.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have a mess. The hostel is good. We can stay in private hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, UdgirReviewed on 8 Jan 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college because faculty members are highly qualified and very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good laboratories for practicals. Our classrooms are digital. Our college has an excellent infrastructure. The hostel is quite old, but we enjoy it. The food in the hostel mess is of good quality.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Bombay Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 31 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There will be no Wi-Fi, and the building is more than 130 years old so the infrastructure is not very good. The hostel facility is both very friendly and very annoying. The canteen and mess are too good. Many sports facilities are available to play.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, UdgirReviewed on 4 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college compared to other colleges present in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for students and staff members 24x7. Laboratories have all the essential devices, equipment, refrigerator, etc. The library has almost all books related to the veterinary field. Many facilities like sports, games, canteen, mess, and medical facilities are provided.

admission_process.title: Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist Universityadmission 2025is currently open for various courses. The university offers courses, such as BSc, BA, BCom, MVoc, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate, PG Diploma and Certificate courses. To get admitted to DDIBU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The application process atDhamma Dipa International Buddhist Universityis conducted online or offline. Read the following article to know more aboutDhamma Dipa International Buddhist Universitycourse admission2025.

Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University admission 2025is entrance-based for PhD courses and merit-based for the rest. The university offers over 25 courses in various streams such as Science, Commerce, Management, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutDhamma Dipa International Buddhist University course admissions2025:
Particulars
Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?

DDIBU courses' admissions are based on merit/ entrance exam scores. Shortlisted candidates may be invited to participate in an interview as part of the admissions process. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Students who are looking for PhD course admission must sit and appear for The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularDhamma Dipa International Buddhist University courses:
Post Graduate

Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University admissionsare primarily merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Dhamma Dipa International Buddhist University Application Process 2025

Candidates looking for course admission can apply at the official website. However, the institute also offers offline application. Candidates looking for offline application can contact the institute to know more.
STEP 2: Selection
Aspirants are selected based on merit, excluding the Phd course. For PhD admission, the institute admits students based onDDIBUPAT (university-level entrance exam).
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theDhamma Dipa International Buddhist University feeto confirm their seats in the university.
